# Bossk Productions

> AI-powered content production studio. We build your project in AI first — creative previews, AI production, and full post production for brands, agencies, and creators worldwide.

## About

Bossk Productions is an Emmy Award-winning AI production studio headquartered in Los Angeles, California, serving clients worldwide. We specialize in creative previews, AI video production, and full post production. Our team has 15+ years of experience in visual effects, editorial, color grading, motion graphics, and sound design across feature films, commercials, brand campaigns, music videos, and digital content.

We build fully realized versions of your project using AI before you commit to traditional production. Clients use our creative previews to test concepts, align stakeholders, and make confident production decisions. When the AI version is the right fit, we take it straight to a finished product — no sets, no crew, no six-figure budget.

## Core Services

- Creative Preview: See a fully realized version of your project before committing to production. Test concepts, get stakeholder buy-in, and move forward with confidence.
- AI Production: We produce finished content using AI — commercials, brand films, product videos, social campaigns, music videos, and more. No traditional production required.
- Post Production: Full-service editorial, color grading, visual effects, motion graphics, sound design, and finishing for any media type.

## Who We Work With

- Brands launching campaigns, product videos, and social content
- Advertising agencies developing concepts and pitches
- Production companies needing post production and VFX
- Creators and filmmakers producing original content
- Companies of any size, anywhere in the world

## Service Area

Bossk Productions works with clients across the United States and internationally. All creative preview and AI production work is delivered remotely. We are headquartered in Los Angeles, California.

## Key Differentiators

- Concept to finished preview in one week
- Zero spend on talent, locations, or sets for AI productions
- Shot-for-shot production-ready previsualization
- 15 years of post production expertise across film and advertising
- Emmy Award-winning leadership team
- Credits include work on Black Panther, Spider-Man, Fast and Furious, and 40+ major features

## Team

- Jason R. Miller, Founder and Chief Creative Officer — Emmy Award-winning filmmaker with 15+ years in VFX, editorial, directing, and AI production
- Isaac Loftus, Executive Producer — Strategic growth, partnerships, and project delivery
- Andrew Oleck, Creative Director — Filmmaker specializing in short films, branded content, and AI storytelling
- Jordan Sloane, Executive Producer — Director and producer with credits on 40+ major features including Black Panther, Spider-Man, and Fast and Furious
